name: delete_power_rails
full_help:
delete_power_rails

Description: 
Delete a Power Rail

Syntax: 
delete_power_rails  [-quiet] [-verbose] <power_rail>

Usage: 
  Name          Description
  -------------------------
  [-quiet]      Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]    Suspend message limits during command execution
  <power_rail>  power rail to delete

Categories: 
XDC, Floorplan

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
